original_statement: which stadium had the highest attendance?
mutated_statement: which place had the highest something?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Semantic vagueness/placeholder substitution: "stadium" (specific venue) generalized to "place" (stadium → place) | "attendance" (specific metric) replaced by vague placeholder "something" (attendance → something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的说明（“The column that can be maximized is attendance. Scanning the attendance values shows the highest is 96,856 at Neyland Stadium…”）以及iteration 0中simple_query的thought（直接断言最高值对应 Neyland Stadium），可见agent未提及问题的模糊性或不确定性，也未请求澄清。Agent将“place”和“something”直接映射为原问题的“stadium”和“attendance”，给出具体答案且语气确定。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”，因为其行为完全假定问题明确并直接执行最大化操作，未表现出任何识别或处理歧义的迹象。
